opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I caught the drain tube on a chair, it ripped halfway out of my stomach, and the sharp pain is making me feel sick.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I had my gallbladder out a few days ago and they left a drain in. About an hour ago I snagged the tube and it pulled partway out — now it hurts badly and I don't know what to do with it.

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour ago, when the drain tube caught on a chair and got pulled
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly an hour and the pain has not eased
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, tearing pain right where the tube goes into my skin
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — it makes me feel sick and I can hardly move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the drain site on the upper right side of my belly, separate from my main operation scar
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since the tube was pulled
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I took paracetamol and ibuprofen and it hasn't helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement makes the sharp pain worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling nauseous from the pain; a small amount of blood at the skin where the tube is
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, this has never happened before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm guarding my belly and can barely get up and move around

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: open gallbladder operation (open cholecystectomy) 4 days ago, with a surgical drain left in place
past_medical_history.how_managed: recovering at home; the drain was draining less and less over the last day or so

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; frightened that the pulled drain has caused serious internal damage or that something inside has come loose

objective_data_offered.value: the drain tube is pulled roughly halfway out of the skin on the upper right side of my belly, the little stitch holding it has snapped, and there is a small amount of blood at the skin edge
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shown on camera; not a clinician wound assessment

objective_data_offered.value: only a small amount of blood at the skin — it is not soaking through, and my main operation scar looks clean and dry
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-observation; the patient cannot assess for deep or internal bleeding
